description: You are a technical writer for the Python Software Foundation completing a release history timeline diagram for an annual report. Using the data in ~/Desktop/python_releases.txt, extend the partial diagram in ~/Diagrams/python_timeline.drawio to include all Python 3.x releases (3.0 through 3.13). Add milestone markers with version numbers and dates, and include 1-2 key features per release as text annotations for both existing 2.x and new 3.x releases. Organize the timeline into three distinct phase containers with unique background colors: 'Python 2 Era' (2.0-2.7), 'Transition Period' (2.6-3.3), and 'Modern Python 3' (3.4-3.13). Add a visible text label 'EOL: Jan 1, 2020' near the Python 2.7 milestone. Save the diagram and export the final timeline as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/exports/python_timeline.pdf.
